title: thelypteris gemmulifera
intro: Thelypteris gemmulifera, also known as the gem-leaf thelypteris, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris gemmulifera include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in the treatment of various respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a decoction by boiling the leaves in water, which can be used to treat various ailments.
